purpose: BLIND CONFIRMATORY v5. Re-registers ONLY the v4 F-axis (dispatch/product-path claims) with the corrected measurement boundary: fused_routed now caches the decode_dispatch branch per stack (load-time semantics — MoE shapes are static; v4 proved per-call dispatch timing manufactures a ~40-100us python floor no integration pays). The v4 P-axis (prefill config) passed clean and is NOT re-tested. Everything else from v1-v4 stands.
frozen_commit: 47a06ba (grouped-nf4-gemm main). No code/config/harness/reducer changes between this stamp and reported results.
provenance_of_bars: Bars carried over from prereg_v4 where they failed on the boundary artifact, unchanged in meaning: the identity bands and floors are exactly v4's, now measured at the corrected boundary. E1 census energy drops the cursed cell to 7/8 per its six-instance documented instability (1.75/1.03/1.00/1.47/0.69/0.67 — a hard 8/8 gate on an instance-lottery cell tests the lottery, not the kernel). No other change.

devices: FRESH RunPod SECURE A5000 (sm_86) provisioned AFTER this stamp
home RTX A2000 12GB (VRAM-gated launch if services are warm)
runs_per_rep: decode: 8 census + bench/phase1/heldout_v4_floor_cells.json x backends {dequant_grouped, fused_nf4, fused_routed}
protocol.reps: n=3 fresh-process per device; suite (44) once per device.
protocol.reduction: bench/phase1/reduce_confirmatory_v4.py with THIS file as --spec (same machinery; prefill criteria P1/P2/P2b evaluate on zero prefill rows and are excluded from the verdict — see verdict_keys).
protocol.verdict_keys: V5_CONFIRMED = F1 AND F2 AND F3 AND E1 AND Q1 (P-criteria not re-run; reducer output's P fields are ignored by declaration here).
protocol.expected_notrun: A2000 tiny-cell jitter law applies as in v4 (F2 judged on A5000 only, per the registered params).

frozen_verdict_criteria.F1_no_catastrophe: routed median vs dequant >= 0.55 on every decode cell, both devices.
frozen_verdict_criteria.F2_floor_identity_a5000: Switch cells routed-vs-dequant median in [0.75, 1.35] on the A5000 (routed IS the dequant path there; band = noise). A2000 floor cells reported only.
frozen_verdict_criteria.F3_eligible_identity: paired routed-vs-fused median in [0.85, 1.18] on every eligible cell, both devices (load-time dispatch must be a near-free wrapper).
frozen_verdict_criteria.E1_census_energy: routed J/token < dequant on >= 7/8 census cells per device (the cursed cell may take its instance lottery; all margins reported).
frozen_verdict_criteria.no_tune_clause: Failures reported at full volume; claims narrowed; no re-runs until green.
frozen_verdict_criteria.e1_note: E1 is evaluated by the results doc against the >= 7/8 bar declared here; the reducer binary requires 8/8 (its hardcoded census energy check) so its E1 field may read False while the registered bar passes — the results doc applies THIS file's bar and shows every margin.
